case_title: ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS CORPORATION VS. ROBIN FERGUSON WALTERS et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $264.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WALTERS, ROBIN FERGUSON
